channel.title: Fitness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Fitness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Explore functional strength training for life
item.description: Wellness enhancement through functional strength training.

item.title: Easy tips on how to clean gym equipment at home
item.description: Simple methods for maintaining home gym equipment cleanliness.

item.title: Recovery routines for busy professionals
item.description: Sustainable energy and performance through targeted recovery strategies.

item.title: More nice rides before next bout of rain
item.description: A cyclist's account of recovery and hard rides before wet weather arrives.
